name: spec-builder
description: Implement a spec-planner plan by dispatching one sub-agent per task in its own isolated workspace (jj or git, jj preferred), gating every task through a semi-formal correctness review and a definition-of-done validation before it merges and is marked Done — parallel by default (max 4 agents) or sequential, walking the dependency graph in waves and keeping the plan folder current as a live board. Self-contained: workspace isolation is vendored, so no other plugin is required.
